items.title: Brazil stunned as Haaland's masterclass sends Norway into last eight
items.summary: Erling Haaland dumped Brazil out of the World Cup at the last-16 stage as his brilliant late double secured a 2-1 win for Norway to set up a quarter-final against England or Mexico.

items.title: Shelter-in-place order amid storm at Azteca before Mexico-England

items.summary: Carlos Queiroz steps down as Ghana head coach after three months in charge following their World Cup exit.

items.title: Mexico vs England DELAYED as extreme weather forces World Cup kick-off time to change
items.summary: ENGLAND's last-16 World Cup showdown with Mexico has been DELAYED by thunderstorms. Fifa rules dictate that any lightning strike detected within an eight-mile radius of the stadium will prompt a 30-minute delay.
